name: Stock Trends API Tools

tools.name: ai_context
tools.title: AI Context
tools.description: Returns dataset structure, indicator definitions, coverage, usage guidance, and discovery links for agents. Use after /v1/ai/tools as the secondary explanatory entry point.

tools.name: ai_proof_market_edge
tools.title: Proof of Value — Market Edge
tools.description: Free, non-metered, no auth required. Returns a static synthetic demonstration of Stock Trends signal structure, value proposition, and field schemas. Use this before purchasing access to confirm field names, trend codes, and RSI baseline semantics. Instruments use impossible synthetic symbols — not real tickers.

tools.name: pricing_metadata
tools.title: Pricing Metadata
tools.description: Returns pricing discovery metadata: supported payment methods, endpoint families, and agent identity guidance. Public, no auth required.

tools.name: pricing_catalog
tools.title: Pricing Catalog
tools.description: Returns the live STC pricing rule catalog. Fetch at agent startup to build a local cost map. Requires a valid API key.

tools.name: cost_estimate
tools.title: Cost Estimate
tools.description: Returns deterministic STC cost estimates for a named workflow before execution. Requires a valid API key.

tools.name: workflows
tools.title: Workflow Registry
tools.description: Returns available multi-step workflows with live per-step STC costs resolved from the pricing engine. Public, no auth required.

tools.name: agents
tools.title: Agent Registry
tools.description: Lists agents registered for the authenticated customer.

tools.name: instrument_lookup
tools.title: Instrument Lookup
tools.description: Looks up a stock or ETF by symbol to retrieve exchange, type, and metadata.

tools.name: agent_screener_top
tools.title: Agent Screener Top
tools.description: Returns top-ranked instruments from the latest Stock Trends signal data. Filters by trend code (default: bullish states ^+, ^-, v^), RSI threshold (relative performance vs S&P 500 benchmark, baseline 100), trend persistence (trend_cnt), and trend maturity (mt_cnt). Each result includes trend, trend_cnt, mt_cnt, rsi, rsi_updn, vol_tag, symbol_exchange. Recommended first premium call for agent workflows.

tools.name: stim_latest
tools.title: STIM Latest
tools.description: Returns the latest ST-IM (Stock Trends Inference Model) forward return expectations and statistical distributions for a symbol. Covers 4, 13, and 40-week horizons. Fields: xNwk1 (lower CI bound), xNwk (mean), xNwk2 (upper CI bound), xNwksd (std deviation). Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.

tools.name: stim_history
tools.title: STIM History
tools.description: Returns historical ST-IM (Stock Trends Inference Model) distribution records for a symbol across 4, 13, and 40-week horizons. Chronological order when symbol+exchange specified. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.

tools.name: selections_latest
tools.title: STIM Select Latest
tools.description: Returns the latest STIM Select (Stock Trends Inference Model Select) stock list ranked by prob13wk descending — the probability of exceeding the 13-week base-period mean random return (2.19%), assuming a normal distribution. Use min_prob13wk to apply a threshold filter. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.

tools.name: selections_history
tools.title: STIM Select History
tools.description: Returns historical STIM Select records. Filter by symbol_exchange, symbol, exchange, or date range. Each entry includes prob13wk — probability of exceeding the 13-week base-period mean random return (2.19%), assuming a normal distribution. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.

tools.name: selections_published_latest
tools.title: Published STIM Select Latest
tools.description: Returns the latest published STIM Select list filtered to the three-horizon published definition: x4wk1 > 0% (4-week lower CI bound), x13wk1 > 2.19% (13-week), x40wk1 > 6.45% (40-week), prob13wk >= 55% by default. Ranked by prob13wk descending. Includes full ST-IM distribution fields. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.

tools.name: selections_published_history
tools.title: Published STIM Select History
tools.description: Returns historical published STIM Select records filtered to the three-horizon criteria and prob13wk threshold. Filter by symbol_exchange, symbol, exchange, or date range. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.

tools.name: market_regime_latest
tools.title: Market Regime Latest
tools.description: Returns the current market regime classification derived from the distribution of Stock Trends trend codes across all active signals. regime_score = bullish_pct minus bearish_pct. Bullish codes: ^+, ^-, v^. Bearish codes: v-, v+, ^v. Also returns avg_rsi (universe relative performance vs S&P 500, baseline 100) and avg_mt_cnt. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.

tools.name: market_regime_history
tools.title: Market Regime History
tools.description: Returns a chronological sequence of weekly market regime snapshots using the same classification logic as /market/regime/latest. Useful for trend context and regime transition analysis. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.

tools.name: market_regime_forecast
tools.title: Market Regime Forecast
tools.description: Returns a deterministic forward regime outlook derived from the direction and consistency of recent weekly regime scores. No ML. forecast_regime: bullish | bearish | mixed. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.

tools.name: evaluate_symbol
tools.title: Evaluate Symbol
tools.description: Evaluates a single symbol's trend context against the live market regime to produce a synthesized bias, confidence score, and decision_score (0-1). Fully deterministic — no ML. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.

tools.name: construct_portfolio
tools.title: Construct Portfolio
tools.description: Constructs a scored portfolio from screened candidates using Stock Trends weighting logic. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.

tools.name: evaluate_portfolio
tools.title: Evaluate Portfolio
tools.description: Evaluates trend alignment, regime fit, and score distribution of a user-supplied portfolio against the current market regime. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.

tools.name: compare_portfolios
tools.title: Compare Portfolios
tools.description: Compares two user-supplied portfolios to quantify differences in score, alignment, and regime fit. Returns comparison.winner and comparison.score_delta. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.

tools.name: breadth_sector_latest
tools.title: Sector Breadth Latest
tools.description: Returns the latest sector breadth snapshot derived from Stock Trends signal distribution across sectors.

tools.name: leadership_summary_latest
tools.title: Leadership Summary Latest
tools.description: Returns the latest leadership summary dataset identifying sector and industry leaders.

usage_guidance: Start with /v1/ai/tools as the primary machine-readable discovery entrypoint.
Call /v1/ai/proof/market-edge (no auth) to preview signal field structure before purchasing access.
Use /v1/ai/context for explanatory dataset context and endpoint group overviews.
Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog at agent startup to resolve live STC costs — do not hardcode.
Use decision and portfolio endpoints for high-value actionable outputs.
Use market regime, breadth, and leadership endpoints for contextual enrichment.
Prefer structured API endpoints over scraping website pages.
